title: elatostema repens var. pulchrum
intro: Elatostema repens var. pulchrum, also known as the 'pretty creeping creper', is a type of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae, native to Southeast Asia and known for its attractive, variegated leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Elatostema repens var. pulchrum include reducing oxidative stress, improving immune function, and providing antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a potential natural remedy for various health concerns. Elatostema repens var. pulchrum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, and may also be dried and used as a powder in capsules or tablets.
